title: stachys citrina subsp. citrina
intro: Stachys citrina subsp. citrina, also known as Lemon Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lemon Betony include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Stachys citrina subsp. citrina typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the essential oil in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
